methodology: Web search across news, research papers, GitHub, forums, and industry reports for demand signals per gap

market_context.gartner_prediction: 75% of businesses will use GenAI for synthetic data by 2026

validated_gaps.title: Domain-Specific Reasoning Data Generation Platform
demand_signals: ACL 2025 paper on synthetic data generation for financial text (SEC 10-K filings) using instruction-tuned LLMs
NeMo Safe Synthesizer launched specifically for HIPAA/GDPR-compliant medical synthetic data
WEF 2025 briefing paper: collision between 'quality training data' hunger and 'strict privacy mandates' in healthcare/finance/energy
ResearchGate paper: 'Enhancing Domain-Specific RAG: Synthetic Data Generation and Evaluation using Reasoning Models'
GPT-4 accuracy on accounting reasoning at 16.58% confirms massive quality gap in domain-specific reasoning

validated_gaps.title: Automated Reasoning Trace Verification & Quality Assurance Platform
demand_signals: EMNLP 2025: 'Rethinking Data Quality for LLM Reasoning' — confirms quality assurance is top challenge
ArXiv 2025: 'Scoring Verifiers: Evaluating Synthetic Verification for Code and Reasoning' — active research on synthetic verifiers
Code execution as grounded supervision (EMNLP 2025) — using code execution for verification
LLM verifiers face challenges in verification speed and accuracy — confirmed tool gap
High-quality training data with verifiable answers described as 'scarce and expensive to curate'

validated_gaps.title: Multi-Provider Reasoning Data Generation Orchestrator
demand_signals: HuggingFace LLM Model Comparison 2026 dataset comparing 16 models from 7 providers — shows demand for comparison
DeepSeek-V3.2 surpassing GPT-5 on reasoning benchmarks — multiple competitive models available
ArXiv 2025: 'Prismatic Synthesis: Gradient-based Data Diversification Boosts Generalization' — multi-source diversity improves outcomes
ICLR 2025 workshop on evaluating diversity and quality of LLM-generated content
Industry trend: teams want to avoid vendor lock-in, especially with DeepSeek, Claude, GPT-4o all competing on reasoning

validated_gaps.title: Visual/No-Code Reasoning Data Pipeline Builder
demand_signals: SyGra Studio (2026) launched visual workflow builder for synthetic data — validates market demand
Databricks Lakeflow Designer: no-code ETL with drag-and-drop — adjacent validation of no-code pipeline trend
Gartner: 70% of new enterprise apps will use low-code/no-code by 2025
NVIDIA blog on building license-compliant synthetic data pipelines — complexity motivates visual tooling
No dedicated visual builder for reasoning data specifically — SyGra Studio is closest but not reasoning-focused

validated_gaps.title: Tool-Use & Agentic Reasoning Data Generator
demand_signals: NVIDIA dedicated use case page: 'Synthetic Data Generation for Agentic AI' — tier-1 vendor validates demand
Gartner: 40% of enterprise apps will have embedded task-specific agents by 2026
Stanford SWiRL paper: synthetic data generation + multi-step RL for reasoning and tool use (ICLR 2026)
Epoch AI: training data exhaustion by 2026 — synthetic agentic data becomes critical
Adaline AI research landscape 2026: agentic AI and tool use are top research priorities

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Data Contamination & Deduplication Detection
demand_signals: Comprehensive survey on contamination detection (ArXiv 2024, updated 2025) — 100+ papers on the topic
ICML 2025 poster: 'How Much Can We Forget about Data Contamination?' — top venue attention
ArXiv 2025: 'Beyond Surface-Level Similarity: Hierarchical Contamination Detection for Synthetic Training Data' — directly targets this gap
COLING 2025: limitations and inconsistencies in contamination detection methods — confirms tool immaturity
LXT 2026 report: benchmark contamination undermines enterprise LLM evaluation trust

validated_gaps.title: Human-in-the-Loop Reasoning Data Curation Platform
demand_signals: VLDB 2025 workshop: 'Human + AI: Large scale Data Curation' — top database venue validates need
Encord blog: HITL is critical for subjective tasks requiring nuanced understanding
ACL 2025: survey of LLM-based active learning — hybrid human-LLM annotation is active research area
NIST Technical Note on human-in-the-loop technical document annotation — government interest
Data curation described as 'labor intensive and costly' with 2:1 to 3:1 annotator-to-reviewer ratios

validated_gaps.title: End-to-End Reasoning Data to RL Training Pipeline
demand_signals: Sebastian Raschka 'State of Reinforcement Learning for LLM Reasoning' (2025) — comprehensive review of fragmented landscape
Kimi-Researcher: end-to-end agentic RL training achieving 26.9% on Humanity's Last Exam — validates E2E approach
RLVR emerged as 'de facto core new stage' in 2025 post-training — confirms RL integration demand
ICLR 2026: HardTestGen for end-to-end test generation and training
SWiRL at Stanford: iterative generation + RL pipeline — research validates concept but no product exists

validated_gaps.title: Difficulty-Calibrated Reasoning Curriculum Generator
demand_signals: EMNLP 2025: 'Learning Like Humans: Adaptive Difficulty Curriculum Learning' — directly validates this gap
ArXiv 2025: 'Self-Evolving Curriculum for LLM Reasoning' — automatic curriculum for RL fine-tuning
ArXiv 2025: 'CLPO: Curriculum Learning meets Policy Optimization' — online curriculum with adaptive difficulty
ArXiv 2025: 'Competence-Difficulty Alignment Sampling' — 57% training time reduction with adaptive difficulty
ICLR 2026: 'On the Limits of Curriculum Learning' — active top-venue research on this exact problem

validated_gaps.title: Multimodal Reasoning Data Generation (Vision + Text + Code)
demand_signals: Microsoft Phi-4-reasoning-vision (2025): synthetic data generation for multimodal reasoning — major vendor investment
CVPR 2025 Workshop: 'Multimodal Algorithmic Reasoning' — top CV venue dedicated workshop
GLM-4.5V-Thinking: multimodal reasoning with scalable RL — validates demand for training data
Code-guided synthetic data generation (LaTeX/HTML) for text-rich images — active technique development
ICLR 2025: enhancing multimodal foundation models with self-synthesized data — confirms generation gap

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Data Marketplace / Sharing Hub
demand_signals: Prime Intellect released SYNTHETIC-1: 900K curated reasoning traces from DeepSeek-R1 — community demand for shared reasoning data
Tether QVAC Genesis II: 148B tokens across 19 educational domains with reasoning — massive dataset releases show demand
Opendatabay, DataXID, Innodata: multiple data marketplaces but none reasoning-specific
10+ AI dataset marketplaces exist (GeeksforGeeks 2025 list) — but no reasoning specialization
Multiple teams independently generating similar reasoning data (DeepSeek 800K, Open-R1 350K, SYNTHETIC-1 900K)

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Trace Diversity & Coverage Analyzer
demand_signals: EMNLP 2025: 'Rethinking Data Quality for LLM Reasoning' — proposes metrics for sampling uniformity, reasoning type diversity via entropy
ArXiv 2025: 'From Blind Spots to Gains: Diagnostic-Driven Iterative Training' — directly about finding dataset blind spots
ArXiv 2025: 'Data Recipes for Reasoning Models' — data mixture optimization for reasoning
CNBC 2025: 'AI's reasoning blind spot' — mainstream media coverage of reasoning gaps
Tsinghua survey: data processing includes deduplication, filtering, domain mixing for diversity — confirms need

validated_gaps.title: Privacy-Preserving Reasoning Data Generation for Enterprises
demand_signals: EU AI Act fully applicable by August 2026 — regulatory urgency
Gartner: 75% of businesses using GenAI for synthetic data by 2026 — enterprise adoption wave
80% of enterprise data in unstructured formats, growing 60% annually — massive proprietary data opportunity
K2view, Gretel, MOSTLY AI, Syntho all in top 2026 lists — but none combine privacy + reasoning
Frontiers 2026: privacy-preserving data generation using dual-discriminator GANs — active research

validated_gaps.title: Real-Time Reasoning Data Flywheel (Production -> Training Loop)
demand_signals: Arize AI + NVIDIA NeMo partnership: 'Building the Data Flywheel for Smarter AI Systems' — vendor collaboration validates
ArXiv 2025: 'Learning from Reasoning Failures via Synthetic Data Generation' — directly describes this concept
MLOps Data Flywheel (2025): version and validate synthetic data streams for industrial reliability
NVIDIA Glossary added 'Data Flywheel' definition — mainstream concept adoption
CorrectNav: self-correction flywheel improved success rate from 16.5% to 81.9% over 3 cycles

validated_gaps.title: Cost-Optimized Reasoning Data Generation (Small Model Bootstrapping)
demand_signals: ArXiv 2025: 'Spend Wisely: Maximizing Post-Training Gains in Iterative Synthetic Data Bootstrapping' — directly addresses cost optimization
Generation cost often exceeds training cost — confirmed pain point
Exponential budget allocation policies outperform constant policies — validated technique
Phi-4 used GPT-4o to generate 10B tokens of reasoning content — shows massive cost at scale
Scale AI blog on synthetic data generation strategies for fine-tuning — practical enterprise interest
